moments.author: Sam Bankman‑Fried
moments.why: A striking comment from an imprisoned ex‑crypto CEO that briefly moved sentiment in markets despite his incarceration.

moments.author: Mohammed Zubair
moments.quote: BREAKING: INSTAGRAM HAS BEEN RUNNING PAID ADS PROMOTING CHILD SEXUAL ABUSE MATERIAL IN INDIA!
moments.why: A widely shared alert that highlighted a severe failure in Instagram’s moderation systems, prompting government action.
